title: ctenopteris nutans
intro: Ctenopteris nutans, also known as the sensitive fern, is a species of fern native to Australia and New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. The plant has been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant properties, which help to loosen and clear mucus from the respiratory system. In herbal preparations, ctenopteris nutans is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a poultice to harness its medicinal benefits, although its use should be done under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
